description: First fix to golf-preview SKILL.md still used a day-of-week offset table tied to the scheduled run day. This is wrong — the skill should always target the upcoming Friday/Saturday/Sunday regardless of when it runs.
correction: Replaced offset table with a simple "days until next Friday" calculation: (4 - current_day_of_week) % 7, with a special case of 7 if today is Friday. Target Saturday and Sunday follow as +1 and +2. No run-day dependency.
systemic_fix: Updated SKILL.md Step 1 with day-agnostic next-Friday calculation. Skill now works correctly regardless of when it is triggered.
